name: Question or Support ❓
about: Ask a question about building, configuring, or understanding the NaikAVPlayer codebase.
title: '[Question] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

<!-- 
Before asking a question, please review the README.md, help.md, and existing GitHub discussions or issues.
-->

## Question or Support Request

*State your question clearly and concisely.*

---

## Context / Use Case

*Explain why you are asking this question or what you are trying to achieve (e.g. compiling NaikAVPlayer with custom FFmpeg libraries, embedding the player inside another application, understanding the video-audio sync clock logic).*

---

## System Configuration (If Applicable)

*If your question relates to build or compile issues, please specify:*
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 10, Ubuntu 20.04]
- **Compiler**: [e.g., MSVC 2019, GCC 11, Clang 14]
- **CMake Version**: [e.g., 3.20.1]
- **FFmpeg & SDL libraries source**: [e.g., standard apt package, vcpkg, conan, manual compile]

---

## What Have You Tried?

*Briefly describe what documentation you have checked, or what code experiments you have attempted before opening this issue.*
